examples: After dinner, it's time to hit the books again—at one of Seoul's many so-called cram schools.
To make up for the mediocrity, zealous parents send their kids to the expensive cram schools.
The aim is to reduce the importance of costly tutors and cram schools, partly to help students enjoy a more normal high-school life.
For serious Beatles aficionados, there are far too many sights to cram into a single Liverpool day.
Sunderland City Council, along with Steve Cram, introduced the Sunderland City 10k to replace the Great North 10k.
